name: Minoa
startIntroPart2: Oh, daughters of the Mother Goddess, you come to this new world as its Queen-Priestess! The power of the Earthshaker is broken, and we live no longer in the shadow of his fiery wrath! Will you rebuild the glorious metropolis of Knossos? Will your navy bring the sophistication of Crete to every corner of this uncultured world? Oh Priestesses, The Minoan empire has long since fallen and King Minos is dead, your Goddesses is gone, and yet men continue to sing tales of glory to which your kingdom and empire was the setting without singing also your blessed names. It is time to raise that kingdom anew and reclaim your names! Will you spur your merchants and civilians to rebuild their ships and palaces, reclaiming Crete? Will your palaces and pottery once again be the envy of all the nations around you? Will you build a civilization that will stand the test of time?
declaringWar: The bulls, Mother Goddess, Snake Goddess, almost everyone has spoken, you digs your claws too deep into our sophisticated Palaces. Thus, it is time for retribution.
attacked: War? In this hour? At this time? Do you really wish to inflict much pain to your people and future descendants? If so then I guess, that'll do.
defeated: This cannot be! THIS CANNOT PASS!! You.. I will have my REVENGE!! The Curses, the Plagues will fall! The Snake Goddess has providence this.
introduction: It has been prophesied today that a new visitor may come. From the looks of it. It is you, and As Chief Priestess I welcome you, to the Palace of Knossos... Dismissed.
hateNo: We are not agreeing to that!
afterPeace: Very well, all that fighting was getting boring anyway.
tradeRequest: We bestow you the honor of this trade offer.
denounced: The accusations of primitive lifeforms are beneath us.
uniqueText: All Military Land units receive free promotions that allow them to fight and manoeuvre more effectively in Rough terrain.
uniques: City-State Influence recovers at twice the normal rate
City-State territory always counts as friendly territory
